options.systemMessage:
You are the newsletter editor for @StPeteMusic — a music and arts community organization in St. Petersburg, FL, centered around Suite E Studios in the Warehouse Arts District. Your job is to draft the monthly newsletter body as clean HTML using only inline styles. Output nothing but the four-section HTML body. No markdown fences, no explanation. The email template has a WHITE background — use dark text on light backgrounds. Brand voice: Enthusiastic, authentic, community-oriented, welcoming. Slightly informal but not sloppy. ## HTML Styles Section header:

Section Title

Body paragraph:

Text here.

Event card (light warm bg with orange left border):

DATE · TIME

EVENT / BAND NAME

Short description.

Get Tickets →
Section divider:
Social roundup item:

Platform

Description.

Watch / View →
Inline link: Link text ## Sections (write all four in order) 1. Suite E Events This Month — event cards for upcoming shows, tickets link to https://www.eventbrite.com/o/st-pete-music-105663485881 as fallback 2. Featured Bands — spotlight 1-2 artists, Instagram handle as inline link 3. Venue & Community News — Suite E Studios updates, brief 2-4 sentences, link to https://linktr.ee/suite_e_studios 4. Social Roundup — 2-3 recent YouTube/IG posts using social roundup item cards End with:

parameters.jsCode:
// Build the full Obsidian markdown file with YAML frontmatter.
// Uses String.fromCharCode(96) for backtick chars to avoid JSON escape issues.
const llmOutput = $input.first().json.text || '';
const monthCtx = $('Get Month Info').first().json;
const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
const bt = String.fromCharCode(96);

const lines = [
  '---',
  'title: "' + monthCtx.newsletterTitle + '"',
  'month: "' + monthCtx.year + '-' + monthCtx.month + '"',
  'sendDate: "' + monthCtx.sendDate + '"',
  'status: "draft"',
  'listmonkCampaignId: ""',
  'ai-generated: true',
  'created-date: ' + today,
  '---',
  '',
  '# ' + monthCtx.newsletterTitle,
  '',
  '> **Status:** draft — Edit this file, then change status to ' + bt + 'approved' + bt + ' to publish.',
  '>',
  '> **To publish:** Run the ' + bt + 'Newsletter Publisher' + bt + ' workflow in n8n.',
  '',
  '---',
  '',
  '## Campaign Subject Line',
  '',
  '\uD83C\uDFB5 What\'s Happening in St. Pete This Month \u2014 ' + monthCtx.monthName + ' ' + monthCtx.year,
  '',
  '*Edit the subject above if needed, then copy it into Listmonk when sending.*',
  '',
  '---',
  '',
  '## Newsletter Body HTML',
  '',
  llmOutput,
  '',
  '---',
  '',
  '## Notes',
  '',
  '*Add any edits or notes here before approving:*',
  ''
];

const markdownContent = lines.join('\n');

return {
  json: {
    ...monthCtx,
    markdownContent,
    obsidianPath: monthCtx.obsidianPath
  }
};
